intro: Spidey was just trying to get his life together this spring cleaning season, but unfortunately things really took a TUMBLE.
caption: I tossed him in with the darks and ran the washing machine on high spin until he was clean and dead.
hidden_touch: A small handwritten sign on the machine reading 'DELICATES ONLY' and a tiny bottle of detergent labeled 'Tide' sitting on top
scene_description: Interior of a laundromat with flat mint-green walls and a white tiled floor. A boxy gray washing machine sits center frame with a circular porthole window showing a blurred gray Spidey tumbling inside. Soap bubbles float near the top. The 'DELICATES ONLY' sign is taped crookedly to the lid. A tiny detergent bottle sits on top. Spidey's dot eyes are visible mid-spin.

intro: Spidey stepped right up to the carnival this summer, eager to prove himself — turns out he really DIDN'T HAVE WHAT IT TAKES to handle the pressure.
caption: I placed him on the base of the high striker and brought the mallet down until the bell rang and he was flat.
hidden_touch: The bell at the top of the tower has a tiny smiley face drawn on it, and a prize ribbon hanging nearby is labeled '1st Place'
scene_description: Outdoor carnival scene with a bright blue sky and a flat yellow ground. A tall red-and-white striped high striker game stands center frame. Spidey is a tiny gray oval at the very base of the platform, barely visible. A large wooden mallet hovers above him mid-swing. The bell at the top has a smiley face. A '1st Place' ribbon dangles from a nearby booth. A few spray-paint tool clouds drift in the background.

intro: Our little scholar was hitting the books hard this back-to-school season — a real VOLUME of bad decisions led him here.
caption: I stacked the entire World Book Encyclopedia collection on top of him, A through Z, while he read.
hidden_touch: The last visible book spine reads 'Vol. 26: Z' and a tiny library card on the floor nearby is stamped 'OVERDUE'
scene_description: A cozy library interior with flat brown wooden shelves lining flat beige walls. A small wooden reading table sits center frame. Spidey is seated at it with a tiny open book in front of him, wearing miniature reading glasses. An enormous teetering stack of colorful encyclopedias looms directly above him mid-fall. The bottom spine reads 'Vol. 1: A' and the top reads 'Vol. 26: Z.' A small 'OVERDUE' library card sits on the floor nearby.

intro: Spidey had always dreamed of reaching for the stars, and honestly his ambitions were truly OUT OF THIS WORLD — right up until they weren't.
caption: I strapped him to the nose of the shuttle and launched it so that he burned up on reentry over the Pacific Ocean.
hidden_touch: A tiny American flag planted near the launchpad and a handwritten countdown chalkboard in the background reading 'T-0'
scene_description: A flat black night sky with spray-paint tool stars scattered across it. A white rocket shuttle stands on a flat gray launchpad at the bottom of the frame, with orange spray-paint tool flames blasting beneath it. Spidey is strapped to the very tip of the nose cone with a tiny helmet on, dot eyes wide. A small American flag is planted beside the launchpad. A chalkboard in the corner reads 'T-0' in chalk letters. The earth is a flat blue-green oval visible far below.

intro: Spidey wandered onto the lanes looking for a good time, but this turned out to be a classic case of being in the WRONG PLACE at the RIGHT TIME for a STRIKE.
caption: I rolled a sixteen-pound ball down lane seven and it hit him straight on while he stood there admiring the pins.
hidden_touch: The scoreboard above the lane shows a perfect score of 300 with Spidey's name written as 'SPIDEY' in the slot, and a rental shoe rack in the corner has one tiny shoe labeled 'Size ½'
scene_description: Interior of a bowling alley with flat dark blue walls and a long flat tan lane stretching toward the back of the frame. Ten white pins are arranged at the far end. Spidey stands in the middle of the lane facing the pins with tiny admiring dot eyes. A large black bowling ball rolls directly toward him from the foreground. An overhead scoreboard reads '300 - SPIDEY.' A shoe rental rack in the corner holds a single tiny shoe tagged 'Size ½.'
